headline: A Look At Constellation Energy’s Valuation As AI Data Center Demand And Calpine Deal Draw Focus
summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) is back in focus after declaring a quarterly dividend of $0.4265 per share, as investors weigh its expanded generation from the Calpine acquisition alongside rising AI data center driven power demand. See our latest analysis for Constellation Energy. Despite a 3.3% 90 day share price return and a 3.4% 7 day share price gain, Constellation Energy’s year to date share price return of an 18.9% decline contrasts with a 33.6% 1 year total shareholder return and a very...
